parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output image format. Valid values: `webp` (smallest), `jpg`, `png`.

parameters.name: output_quality
parameters.description: Output quality (0-100). Higher = better quality but larger file size.

parameters.name: num_outputs
parameters.description: Number of image variations to generate (1-4). Each variation is unique.

parameters.name: webhook
parameters.description: Callback URL for completion notification. POST request sent with generation results when complete.

exampleRequest.prompt:
A cinematic beach portrait that evolves into an energy-charged scene. Photorealistic, stable identity matching the reference image, natural lighting, smooth cinematic motion, no subtitles.

Shot 1 [0-4s] Continue from the first frame of the reference image. The man stands on a sunny beach wearing a black t-shirt with glowing blue flame graphics. Gentle ocean waves move behind him and wind lightly moves his hair and shirt. The blue flame design on the shirt begins to softly glow and flicker like living energy.

Shot 2 [4-8s] Slow cinematic push-in toward the subject. The glowing blue flames on the shirt animate and flow upward like magical energy. Subtle particles and light streaks appear around the flame pattern. The ocean sparkles in the sunlight while waves roll naturally in the background.

Shot 3 [8-12s] Hard cinematic cut to a slightly closer angle. The blue flames briefly expand outward as luminous energy patterns around the torso before settling back onto the shirt. The wind becomes slightly stronger, moving the shirt fabric and hair while the beach environment remains realistic.

Shot 4 [12-15s] Final cinematic close shot. The flames stabilize into a calm glowing pattern on the shirt while the subject stands confidently against the horizon. The camera slowly drifts sideways with warm sunlight reflecting off the ocean, ending in a clean photorealistic frame.

modalities.name: Upscale Image Request - SeedVR Upscale API

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: URL of the image to upscale. Must be publicly accessible (HTTPS recommended). Supported formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP.

parameters.name: upscale_mode
parameters.description: Upscaling mode. Valid values: `factor` (multiply resolution), `target` (specific resolution).

parameters.name: upscale_factor
parameters.description: Upscale multiplier (1-8). Only used with `upscale_mode: "factor"`. Higher values = larger output. Recommended: 2-4 for best results.

parameters.name: target_resolution
parameters.description: Target output resolution. Valid values: `720p`, `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`. Only used with `upscale_mode: "target"`.

parameters.name: noise_scale
parameters.description: Noise reduction strength (0.0-1.0). Lower = preserve details/texture, Higher = smoother/cleaner. Recommended: 0.05-0.15 for photos, 0.08-0.12 for digital art.

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output image format. Valid values: `jpg` (smaller files, photos), `png` (lossless, graphics), `webp` (modern, efficient).

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducibility. Use the same seed to get consistent results across runs.

parameters.name: sync_mode
parameters.description: Synchronous mode. If true, returns image as data URI (not recommended for production).

parameters.name: webhook
parameters.description: Callback URL for completion notification. POST request sent with upscaling results when complete.

parameters.name: webhook_events_filter
parameters.description: Events that trigger webhook. Valid values: `["*"]` (all events), `["completed"]` (success/failure only).

modalities.name: Upscale Video Request - SeedVR Upscale API

parameters.name: video_url
parameters.description: URL of the video to upscale. Must be publicly accessible (HTTPS recommended). Supported formats: MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM.

parameters.name: upscale_mode
parameters.description: Upscaling mode. Valid values: `factor` (multiply resolution), `target` (specific resolution).

parameters.name: upscale_factor
parameters.description: Upscale multiplier (1-4). Only used with `upscale_mode: "factor"`. Higher values = larger output. Use 1 for quality enhancement without size increase.

parameters.name: target_resolution
parameters.description: Target output resolution. Valid values: `720p`, `1080p`. Only used with `upscale_mode: "target".

parameters.name: noise_scale
parameters.description: Noise reduction strength (0.0-1.0). Lower = preserve details/grain, Higher = smoother/cleaner. Recommended: 0.05-0.2.

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output video codec. Valid values: `X264 (.mp4)` (widely compatible), `H265 (.mp4)` (better compression, newer devices).

parameters.name: output_quality
parameters.description: Output encoding quality. Valid values: `low` (faster, smaller file), `medium` (balanced), `high` (best quality, recommended).

parameters.name: output_write_mode
parameters.description: Encoding speed/quality tradeoff. Valid values: `fast` (quick encoding), `balanced` (recommended), `quality` (slower, best quality).

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducibility. Use the same seed to get consistent results across runs.

parameters.name: webhook
parameters.description: Callback URL for completion notification. POST request sent with upscaling results when complete.

parameters.name: webhook_events_filter
parameters.description: Events that trigger webhook. Valid values: `["*"]` (all events), `["completed"]` (success/failure only), `["start", "output", "completed"]`.
